_provenance: Major planetary combinations (raja/dhana yogas and notable difficult combinations) as detected by src/services/astro-engine.js detectYogas()/detectDoshas() — the same conditions that already fire on the live charts. Structured here as data (condition + effect + factors), not prose. Framework-sourced; PDFs absent at build time.
_shape: array of { code, name, category(raja|wealth|intellect|mahapurusha|cancellation|difficult), condition, effect, factors[] }

yogas.name: Gaja Kesari
yogas.condition: Jupiter in a kendra (1/4/7/10) from the Moon
yogas.effect: wisdom, respect and lasting good fortune

yogas.name: Budha-Aditya
yogas.condition: Sun and Mercury in the same sign (Mercury not combust for the full effect)

yogas.name: Chandra-Mangal
yogas.condition: Moon and Mars in the same sign
yogas.effect: drive and resourcefulness, often earning capacity

yogas.name: Pancha Mahapurusha
yogas.condition: Mars/Mercury/Jupiter/Venus/Saturn in own or exalted sign AND in a kendra from the Lagna
yogas.effect: a standout quality of that planet (courage/intellect/wisdom/charm/discipline)

yogas.name: Raja Yoga
yogas.condition: a kendra (1/4/7/10) lord and a trikona (5/9) lord occupy the same house

yogas.name: Vipreet Raja Yoga
yogas.condition: a dusthana (6/8/12) lord occupies a dusthana
yogas.effect: adversity that ultimately turns to advantage

yogas.name: Adhi Yoga
yogas.condition: benefics (Jupiter/Venus/Mercury) occupy the 6th-8th from the Moon

yogas.name: Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga
yogas.condition: a debilitated planet whose dispositor is angular (kendra) — the debilitation is cancelled
yogas.effect: an early weakness that becomes a source of strength

yogas.name: Mangal (Manglik)
yogas.condition: Mars in house 1/2/4/7/8/12 from the Lagna, Moon or Venus
yogas.effect: heat and force in partnership; traditionally matched with a similarly-placed partner; often cancelled by other factors

yogas.name: Kaal Sarp
yogas.condition: every planet falls on one side of the Rahu-Ketu axis
yogas.effect: intensity and delays early on, often easing with age

yogas.name: Kemadruma
yogas.condition: no planet (except Sun/nodes) in the 2nd/12th from the Moon and none with the Moon
yogas.effect: emotional ups and downs; readily mitigated by a strong Moon or aspects
